mapper.sql: id, task_id AS taskId, task_name AS taskName, task_category AS taskCategory, algorithm_type AS algorithmType, sub_type AS subType, resource_id AS resourceId, resource_name AS resourceName, params, task_state AS taskState, progress, result_path AS resultPath, error_msg AS errorMsg, remark, user_id AS userId, user_name AS userName, create_date AS createDate, start_time AS startTime, end_time AS endTime
mapper.select: SELECT , result_content AS resultContent FROM sp_ext_task WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND is_del = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sp_ext_task (task_id, task_name, task_category, algorithm_type, sub_type, resource_id, resource_name, params, task_state, progress, result_content, result_path, error_msg, remark, user_id, user_name, organ_id, create_date, start_time, end_time) VALUES (#{taskId}, #{taskName}, #{taskCategory}, #{algorithmType}, #{subType}, #{resourceId}, #{resourceName}, #{params}, #{taskState}, #{progress}, #{resultContent}, #{resultPath}, #{errorMsg}, #{remark}, #{userId}, #{userName}, #{organId}, NOW(), #{startTime}, #{endTime})
mapper.update:
UPDATE sp_ext_task
task_state = #{taskState}, progress = #{progress}, result_content = #{resultContent}, result_path = #{resultPath}, error_msg = #{errorMsg}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, id = id
WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND is_del = 0
UPDATE sp_ext_task SET is_del = 1 WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND is_del = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sp_ext_log (task_id, task_name, task_category, log_level, log_content, create_date) VALUES (#{taskId}, #{taskName}, #{taskCategory}, #{logLevel}, #{logContent}, NOW())
